description: Update the shared relational API metadata formatter so `_etag` derivation recursively removes every server-generated field named `id`, `link`, `_etag`, or `_lastModifiedDate` before canonical JSON serialization. Acceptance: relational resources and descriptors use the same canonicalization path; `link` subtrees at root, reference, collection, nested collection, and `_ext` locations never affect the hash; real resource-state value changes still produce a different hash; existing metadata injection and readable-profile `RefreshEtag` behavior continue to work.
steps-to-verify: Add unit tests in `RelationalApiMetadataFormatterTests` covering nested `link`, root metadata, descriptor bodies, and a real reference identity value change.
Run: `dotnet test --no-restore ./src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter RelationalApiMetadataFormatter`

description: Add a typed `If-Match`/write-precondition contract and use it instead of direct backend header reads. Acceptance: Core constructs the contract once from request headers using exact opaque-string semantics; absent means the header key is not present after frontend filtering; any non-dropped blank/whitespace value is treated as present and mismatched; no quote normalization, entity-tag list parsing, splitting, trimming, or malformed-header rejection is performed; relational and descriptor backend code consume only the typed contract, not `Headers["If-Match"]`.
steps-to-verify: Add unit tests for absent, exact value, quoted value, whitespace value, and collapsed multi-value strings.
Run: `dotnet test --no-restore ./src/dms/core/EdFi.DataManagementService.Core.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Core.Tests.Unit.csproj`
Run: `dotnet test --no-restore ./src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter Precondition`

description: Add `UpsertResult.UpsertFailureETagMisMatch` and wire all HTTP mappings to the existing 412 optimistic-lock response shape. Acceptance: POST upsert-as-update and POST create-new-with-If-Match can return the new result; `UpsertHandler` maps it to the same `urn:ed-fi:api:optimistic-lock-failed` body used by `UpdateFailureETagMisMatch` and `DeleteFailureETagMisMatch`; retry policy does not treat ETag mismatch as retryable; existing update/delete 412 behavior remains unchanged.
steps-to-verify: Add Core handler unit tests for `UpsertFailureETagMisMatch` response status/body and retry classification.
Run: `dotnet test --no-restore ./src/dms/core/EdFi.DataManagementService.Core.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Core.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter "UpsertHandler|DeadlockRetryPolicy"`

description: Plumb the readable comparison surface needed for `If-Match` through Core/backend relational write contracts. Acceptance: profiled PUT and profiled POST-as-update compare against the readable-profile projected representation the client would have received from a profiled GET and return that same profile-surface ETag on successful profiled writes; no-profile writes compare against the full resource-state representation; DELETE ignores profile media-type headers for precondition purposes and uses the full-resource ETag; writable descriptor profiles either fail before precondition logic if unsupported or explicitly carry the same readable surface if they are supported.
steps-to-verify: Add unit tests proving request construction carries precondition plus readable projection context independently from the writable profile body.
Add backend unit tests proving profiled committed write responses return the projected ETag while DELETE uses the full-resource ETag.
Run: `dotnet test --no-restore ./src/dms/core/EdFi.DataManagementService.Core.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Core.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter Profile`
Run: `dotnet test --no-restore ./src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter Profile`

description: Implement a relational current-representation precondition helper for existing relational-table resources. Acceptance: inside the write transaction, the helper re-resolves or confirms the target, locks the target `dms.Document` row (`FOR UPDATE` for PostgreSQL, `UPDLOCK, HOLDLOCK, ROWLOCK` for SQL Server), hydrates/materializes the current representation, applies the readable profile projection when supplied, computes the link-excluding `_etag`, and compares it exactly to the typed precondition value while holding the row lock through subsequent DML or delete.
steps-to-verify: Add unit tests for PostgreSQL and SQL Server lock SQL, exact comparison success/failure, and profile-projected comparison.
Run: `dotnet test --no-restore ./src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter "CurrentEtag|Precondition"`

description: Enforce optional `If-Match` for relational-table PUT and POST upsert flows in the authoritative in-transaction path. Acceptance: absent `If-Match` preserves existing behavior; exact match allows changed writes and guarded no-op success; mismatch returns `UpdateFailureETagMisMatch` or `UpsertFailureETagMisMatch` before reference resolution, profile creatability validation, merge validation, or DML after target existence and authorization are satisfied; POST resolving to create-new with present `If-Match` returns `UpsertFailureETagMisMatch` before deeper backend validation; PUT missing target remains 404.
steps-to-verify: Add executor/repository unit tests for absent header, exact match, mismatch, PUT missing target, POST-as-update mismatch, and POST create-new-with-If-Match.

Run: `dotnet test --no-restore ./src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter "RelationalDocumentStoreRepository|DefaultRelationalWriteExecutor|Precondition"`

description: Enforce optional `If-Match` for relational-table DELETE by id. Acceptance: missing target still returns 404; absent `If-Match` preserves existing delete behavior; present exact match locks and compares the current full-resource representation before deleting; present mismatch returns `DeleteFailureETagMisMatch` without issuing the delete; the lock is held through delete/commit; existing FK conflict mapping to 409 remains unchanged.
steps-to-verify: Add unit tests for PostgreSQL and SQL Server delete precondition lock SQL, exact success, mismatch 412 result, 404 precedence, and FK conflict preservation.
Run: `dotnet test --no-restore ./src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter "RelationalDelete|Precondition"`

description: Change stale guarded no-op handling to honor present `If-Match`. Acceptance: when the shared guarded no-op freshness recheck reports stale and the precondition is present, PUT returns `UpdateFailureETagMisMatch` and POST-as-update returns `UpsertFailureETagMisMatch` immediately with no stale retry; when the precondition is absent, the existing single stale-no-op retry remains unchanged; behavior applies to both no-profile and profiled guarded no-op paths.
steps-to-verify: Update unit tests for `DefaultRelationalWriteExecutor` and repository retry behavior for stale no-op with and without a precondition.
Update existing PostgreSQL/MSSQL guarded no-op integration fixtures or add focused tests using the existing stale freshness checker doubles.
Run: `dotnet test --no-restore ./src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter "GuardedNoOp|Stale"`

description: Refactor descriptor POST and PUT to enforce the same typed optional `If-Match` semantics as relational-table resources. Acceptance: `DescriptorWriteRequest` carries the typed precondition; descriptor POST resolving to create-new with present `If-Match` returns `UpsertFailureETagMisMatch`; descriptor POST-as-update and PUT compare exactly against the current descriptor resource-state ETag while holding the owning `dms.Document` row lock; absent `If-Match` preserves existing behavior; descriptor PUT no-op success does not stamp or journal; identity/URI immutability behavior remains unchanged.
steps-to-verify: Add descriptor write unit tests for absent precondition, exact match, mismatch, POST create-new-with-If-Match, POST-as-update exact/mismatch, PUT no-op, and immutable URI changes.
Run: `dotnet test --no-restore ./src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter DescriptorWriteHandler`

description: Enforce optional `If-Match` for descriptor DELETE. Acceptance: descriptor delete carries a typed precondition rather than raw headers; missing descriptor target still returns 404; absent `If-Match` preserves existing descriptor delete behavior; exact match locks the owning `dms.Document` row and allows delete; mismatch returns `DeleteFailureETagMisMatch` without issuing delete; descriptor FK conflict mapping remains unchanged.
steps-to-verify: Add descriptor delete unit tests for absent precondition, exact match, mismatch, missing target precedence, and FK conflict preservation.
Run: `dotnet test --no-restore ./src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter DescriptorWriteHandlerDelete`

description: Add coverage proving resource links do not affect `If-Match`. Acceptance: a client ETag obtained with `DataManagement:ResourceLinks:Enabled=true` succeeds when the write precondition check runs against a link-stripped representation; a client ETag obtained with links disabled succeeds when the backend has a link-bearing intermediate document; flag-on and flag-off responses for the same resource-state surface produce identical `_etag` values; any failures are fixed in the shared canonicalization or response strip path, not by special-casing `If-Match`.
steps-to-verify: Add unit tests around link-bearing/link-stripped canonicalization and focused relational integration or E2E tests for both ResourceLinks flag states.
Run: `dotnet test --no-restore ./src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter RelationalApiMetadataFormatter`
Run the focused relational integration tests added for ResourceLinks flag-on/flag-off If-Match behavior.

description: Add cross-dialect relational integration tests proving dependency identity changes make stale `If-Match` fail. Acceptance: using the small referential-identity fixture, create Student and dependent ResourceA, capture ResourceA `_etag`, update Student.studentUniqueId with `allowIdentityUpdates=true`, verify ResourceA's served `_etag` changed due to propagated reference identity values, then assert a stale `If-Match` on ResourceA PUT returns 412 for both PostgreSQL and SQL Server.
steps-to-verify: Add PostgreSQL and SQL Server integration tests using Student -> ResourceA from the small/referential-identity fixtures.

Run: `dotnet test --no-restore ./src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Postgresql.Tests.Integration/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Postgresql.Tests.Integration.csproj --filter IfMatch`
Run: `dotnet test --no-restore ./src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Mssql.Tests.Integration/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Mssql.Tests.Integration.csproj --filter IfMatch`

description: Move or retag the existing resource `If-Match` E2E scenarios so they execute against the relational backend without reducing scenario coverage. Acceptance: the scenarios in `src/dms/tests/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.E2E/Features/Resources/etag.feature` still cover retrieving ETag, PUT exact match, request-body `_etag` ignored, PUT mismatch 412, DELETE mismatch 412, and DELETE exact match; the relational backend is enabled for this lane; setup/teardown uses the DMS E2E local stack instructions.
steps-to-verify: Run from `src/dms/tests/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.E2E`: `pwsh ./teardown-local-dms.ps1; pwsh ./setup-local-dms.ps1`
Run the E2E test filter for `Features/Resources/etag.feature` with `UseRelationalBackend=true`.
Confirm the generated scenario coverage remains equivalent to the pre-relational feature coverage.

description: Run and fix the focused regression suite for DMS-1005 after the implementation slices land. Acceptance: Core handler tests, backend unit tests, PostgreSQL relational integration tests, SQL Server relational integration tests, descriptor tests, and the relational E2E ETag scenarios all pass; no backend code path performs raw `If-Match` header parsing; no tests rely on quote normalization or parsed entity-tag semantics.
steps-to-verify: Run: `rg "If-Match|Headers\[|TryGetValue\(\"If-Match" src/dms/backend src/dms/core -g '*.cs'` and verify only the Core precondition factory or tests read the raw header.
Run: `dotnet test --no-restore ./src/dms/core/EdFi.DataManagementService.Core.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Core.Tests.Unit.csproj`
Run: `dotnet test --no-restore ./src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit.csproj`
Run the focused PostgreSQL and SQL Server relational integration filters added for this story.
Run the relational E2E ETag feature after local DMS setup.
